subcodes.first_line: O my spirit and my joy! Thy letter was received. Its contents were of utmost delicacy and replete with meaning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روح و ریحانم بنم تحریرکز آلندی مضمونی نهایت لطیف اولوب در معانی ایله مشحون
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
